reason: Glyph applied to real person as identity. ◈ marks structural conditions in scans, not people.

claim: The character crosses a threshold once in Act I, so mark ◈.
reason: Momentary crossing is ◇. ◈ requires sustained duration evidence.
◈ proves threshold is occupied, not that transformation occurred.
P4 witnesses. ◈ marks the sustained threshold condition being witnessed.
✦ marks a cue became visible, not that it is important or true.
⚑ marks a routing condition. Failure/block requires ⊘.
⊘ marks a specific claim or transition as refused, not a person or artifact.

claim: ※ placed on scan but no nearest confusion provided.
⧖ means the claim is verified as true.
◇ and ◈ both applied to the same scene at the same temporal point.
reason: ◇ marks momentary event; ◈ marks sustained residence. Mutually exclusive at same temporal point.

claim: ◈ used with full MVS complete, registry status candidate_authorial_lock_pending. Claim: EMET.
reason: ◈ caps at DAVAR until GLYPH-REG-001 receipt regardless of MVS completeness.

claim: ⚑ placed at MVS Step 5 without naming the gate being activated.
✦ placed after T3 primitive assigned and ※ check completed.
◈ placed first in scan, before ✦ or ◇.
reason: ✦ must precede all. ◈ requires ◇ as intermediate event.

claim: ⧖ placed with no timestamp and no registry hash.
reason: ⧖ requires timestamp + registry hash to constitute custody.

claim: G5 ⊘ reserved_candidate used in EMET-claiming institutional publication.
reason: Reserved candidate glyphs cannot appear in public or EMET-claiming contexts.

claim: ◈ used without nearest confusion check against ◇.
reason: ◈ must explicitly reject ◇ with a reason.
